gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/402)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/402)
text: كُنَّا جَمَاعَةً مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا دَخَلْنَا الْحَمَّامَ فَلَمَّا خَرَجْنَا لَقِيَنَا أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَقَالَ لَنَا مِنْ أَيْنَ أَقْبَلْتُمْ فَقُلْنَا لَهُ مِنَ الْحَمَّامِ فَقَالَ أَنْقَى اللَّهُ غَسْلَكُمْ فَقُلْنَا لَهُ جُعِلْنَا فِدَاكَ وَ إِنَّا جِئْنَا مَعَهُ حَتَّى دَخَلَ الْحَمَّامَ فَجَلَسْنَا لَهُ حَتَّى خَرَجَ فَقُلْنَا لَهُ أَنْقَى اللَّهُ غَسْلَكَ فَقَالَ طَهَّرَكُمُ اللَّهُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, raising it, from Abdullah Bin Muskan who said,

‘We were a group of our companions, and we entered the bathhouse. So when we went out, we met Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, so he<sup>asws</sup> said to us: ‘Where are you coming back from?’ So we said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘From the bathhouse’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘May Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Purify your bathing’. So we said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘May we be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>’. And we went with him<sup>asws</sup> until he<sup>asws</sup> entered the bathhouse. So we sat around (waiting) for him<sup>asws</sup> until he<sup>asws</sup> came out. So we said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘May Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Purify your<sup>asws</sup> bathing’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘May Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Clean you all’.
en.sarwar: 19. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ali ibn al-Hassan al-Taymiy from Muhammad ibn abu Hamzah from ‘Umar ibn Yazid who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that ’Amir al-Mu’minin has said, ‘You must not lie down on your back in the bathhouse; it melts the fat of kidneys and must not rub your feet with pottery because it may cause leprosy.”’
